title: Lunch
content: Reminder that lunch is not at 12pm but is at 1pm.

title: Dinner meetup
content: Please come to the meeting room so we can decide on what to get for dinner. We are choosing between certain pizza from Dominos

title: Check-in form #1
content: Please complete the Check-in form #1 now. If you complete this form you will get some free merchandise from Jane Street. One person from each team needs to fill it out. https://cfadelaide.fillout.com/checkin1.

title: Dinner
content: Dinner is ready, we have Dominos plus drinks.

title: Karaoke time!
content: We're getting ready for karaoke now! Please meet in Room A if you want to attend, otherwise continue working on your project :)

title: Winding down
content: Begin to wind down, to allow others wanting to, to sleep otherwise please be quieter and work together. This will be the last annoucement for the day, unless there is a safety annoucement.
